title: CircleCI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for CircleCI CLI commands and configuration

commands.description: Specify a Docker executor in CircleCI config
commands.scenario: Specify a Docker executor in CircleCI config

commands.command:
jobs:
  build:
    docker:
      - image: circleci/node:14
    steps:
      - checkout
      - run: npm install
commands.description: Define a simple job in CircleCI
commands.scenario: Define a simple job in CircleCI

commands.command:
steps:
  - restore_cache:
      key: dependency-cache-{{ checksum "package-lock.json" }}
  - run: npm install
  - save_cache:
      key: dependency-cache-{{ checksum "package-lock.json" }}
      paths:
        - node_modules
commands.description: Use caching to speed up builds
commands.scenario: Use caching to speed up builds

commands.command:
workflows:
  version: 2
  build_and_test:
    jobs:
      - build
    triggers:
      - schedule:
          cron: "0 0 * * 0"
          filters:
            branches:
              only:
                - main

jobs:
  build:
    docker:
      - image: circleci/node:14
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
    steps:
      - checkout
      - run: npm install
